summary: Replaced the PID guard with the exact 001B fixes: absolute runtime/launcher.pid path anchored to SPORTS_BOT_DIR plus Windows ctypes OpenProcess liveness check.
Guard now correctly detects an already-running launcher and exits before spawning duplicate children.
result: Verification returned: 'ERROR: launcher already running at PID 23760. Stop it first.'
This confirms the duplicate-instance guard is now firing against a live launcher instead of silently allowing a second instance.
risks: A full fresh-start/cleanup cycle was not completed in this pass because an existing launcher was already running during verification.
